payloads.description: Activated PNP status payload mirrored from aisknab/pnp public/pnp-status.json.
One-command source/checker verifier upload flow: npm run verify, then type y to submit the run report.
Legacy reviewer entrypoint, handoff, and public-review boundary summary.
Legacy status-bound public theorem-emission gate from the older public-review boundary. Superseded by pnp-status after activation.
Legacy external-review status summary. External review is now framed as audit/reproducibility evidence, not a theorem premise.
Public registry for reproducible verifier run reports.
Policy payload for comparing normalized digest fields across activated verifier run records.
Static matrix of normalized digest comparisons over the public activated verifier-run registry.
Compact badge summary of the public verifier-run comparison matrix.

uploadPrompt: Upload verification run to PNP Labs? [y/N]
nonClaims: These static payloads mirror the activated aisknab/pnp status payload.
These static payloads are not independent external consensus.
External review remains invited as reproducibility and audit evidence, not as a mathematical premise.
The historical sealed report is not mutated by this site update.
